menu_import_keybox_desc: Downloads and installs remote keybox to Tricky Store
menu_force_clear: 强制停止 Google Play Store 并清除数据
menu_force_clear_desc: Force-stops Play Store and wipes its data cache
menu_target_desc: Generates Tricky Store target.txt with all installed apps
menu_patch_desc: Writes spoofed security patch date to Tricky Store
menu_blacklist_toggle_desc: Exclude detector apps from target.txt generation
menu_smartmerge_desc_sub: Edit /sdcard/Specter/customize.txt for per-app suffix control (!, ?, or bare)
menu_smartmerge_hint: One package per line. Suffix with ! (force) or ? (conditional)
menu_custom_keybox_desc: Use your own keybox file, URL, or device path
advance_clear_all_detection_traces_desc: Deletes detector app data, temp files, resets props, removes ODEX
advance_kill_all_desc: Force-stops and clears data for all known detector apps
advance_set_verified_boot_desc: Reads and writes verified boot hash for attestation
advance_wdevinel1_desc: Installs attestation keys for Widevine L1 DRM (Qualcomm devices only)
advance_toggle_recovery_desc: Hides TWRP, OrangeFox, FOX, PBRP, PitchBlack, Recovery at boot
advance_set_hma_desc: Downloads HMA-OSS config from GitHub with proper permissions
advance_set_zygisk_next_configs: 设置 Zygisk Next 配置
advance_set_pif_desc: Runs Play Integrity Fix auto-update scripts
tools_danger_zone_desc: Destructive operations that may affect your device
danger_confirm_msg: This action may affect your device. Are you sure?
settings_dev_mode_desc: 显示原始脚本名称和终端输出
update_note: 加入我们的 Telegram 频道或者查看 GitHub 以获取最新更新、贡献清单和技术讨论。
history_empty: 暂无活动 - 运行一个操作开始
custom_kb_cleared: 自定义 Keybox 已清除
custom_kb_installed: 自定义 Keybox 已安装
custom_kb_private_ask: 这是一个私人 Keybox 吗？
custom_kb_not_found_desc: 此 Keybox 无法匹配到任何已知来源
advance_scan_clean_props_desc: Scan and remove leftover Xposed, ADB, LuckyTool, and modding tool traces
